title: Peeps Mod
description: Peeps mod is a mod that adds one new food to the game: The Peep, and it's block.
body:
Peep Mod is a mod that adds 2 things: The Peep and the Block of Peeps

Peep:
The Peep is a food made of Sugar, a Slime Ball and a Yellow Dye
it restore quite a lot of food and is eaten very fast.

Block of Peeps:
The Block of Peeps is a decorative block made of 4 Peeps.
